bundles.drift_message: manual test — Flutter merged to staging, PHP merged to master; deploy SHA not verified
bundles.qa_intent:
₹1 free trial — test ALL user paths separately.

MILESTONES:
1. Launch (#3274): free_membership_trail table created
2. Popup/eligibility (#3279-#3351): who sees trial popup/banner
3. Payment/recurring/cancel (#3387-#3438): ₹1 checkout, recurring billing, cancel flow
4. Eligibility gating (#3514-#3557): ML %, app build version, member_id thresholds
5. Billing deferral + cohort cap (#3565-#3590): deferral logic, stop at member_id 2818600

FLUTTER PATHS (do not collapse):
- Home banner: trial_offer_banner_top + trial_offer_ends_countdown_line
- Trial popup on home
- Onboarding: onboarding_one_rs_trial_plan_screen.dart
- Profile: one_rs_trial_plan_card.dart
- Checkout: ₹1 list price via plan_buy_now_button
- Header countdown sync (header_countdown_view_model)

ELIGIBILITY:
- IN cohort → banner + popup + profile card visible
- OUT (ML %, build, member_id > 2818600) → no trial UI

BACKEND VERIFY:
- Row in free_membership_trail on trial start
- Recurring charge scheduled/deferred
- Cancel clears trial state
- Cohort cap blocks new enrollments after member_id 2818600
hints: env: Flutter on staging, PHP on master
